# Generated by iptables-save v1.8.7 on Sat Mar 22 10:00:00 2026
*filter
:INPUT ACCEPT [3000:150000]
:FORWARD DROP [0:0]
:OUTPUT ACCEPT [2800:140000]
-A INPUT -i lo -j ACCEPT
-A INPUT -m conntrack --ctstate ESTABLISHED,RELATED -j ACCEPT
-A INPUT -p udp --dport 51820 -j ACCEPT
-A INPUT -p tcp --dport 22 -j ACCEPT
-A FORWARD -i wg0 -j ACCEPT
-A FORWARD -o wg0 -m conntrack --ctstate ESTABLISHED,RELATED -j ACCEPT
COMMIT
*nat
:PREROUTING ACCEPT [0:0]
:INPUT ACCEPT [0:0]
:OUTPUT ACCEPT [0:0]
:POSTROUTING ACCEPT [0:0]
-A POSTROUTING -s 10.200.200.0/24 -o eth0 -j MASQUERADE
COMMIT
